channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Australian Open: Naomi Osaka is back in a Slam's 3rd round for the 1st time in 3 years
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Naomi Osaka's second-round match at the Australian Open could not possibly have started in a worse way. All of 21 minutes in, she sailed a forehand service return well long and, just like that, trailed 5-0.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Novak Djokovic breaks a tie with Roger Federer for the most Grand Slam matches in tennis history
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic added yet another record to his lengthy list, breaking a tie with Roger Federer for the most Grand Slam matches played in tennis history by reaching 430 on Wednesday at the Australian Open in what was a tougher-than-expected second-round victory.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: High-flying Plateau Valley Cowboys dominate Caprock in boys and girls basketball
item.description: With the Caprock Academy Eagles in town, Plateau Valley displayed their skill and athleticism in both girls and boys hoops.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Antetokounmpo gets 50th career triple-double as Bucks win 130-115 to end Kings' 7-game win streak
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 30 points, 13 assists and 11 rebounds for his 50th career triple-double as the Milwaukee Bucks beat Sacramento 130-115 on Tuesday night to snap the Kings’ seven-game win streak. Antetokounmpo’s triple-double was his fifth of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: As fires ravage Los Angeles, Tiger Woods isn't sure what will happen with Riviera tournament
item.description: Tiger Woods isn’t sure what’s going to happen with next month’s Genesis Invitational, the PGA Tour event that he hosts in the fire-ravaged Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Canadiens' Emil Heineman is out 3-4 weeks after getting hit by a car while walking in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montreal Canadiens player Emil Heineman is expected to miss three to four weeks after being hit by a car while walking in downtown Salt Lake City a day before playing at the Utah Hockey Club.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings rookie JJ McCarthy shares cryptic post following crushing playoff defeat
item.description: Minnesota Vikings rookie quarterback J.J. McCarthy shared a cryptic post on social media following the team's crushing defeat to the Rams in the Wild-Card round on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans waive Diontae Johnson, who was released earlier by Ravens after refusing to enter a game
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The Houston Texans waived Diontae Johnson Tuesday after the beleaguered receiver — who was released by the Ravens earlier this season after refusing to enter a game — played just two games for them.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike Tomlin doesn't feel the Steelers are stuck, but all options are on the table heading into 2025
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — There is a sameness to the way the Pittsburgh Steelers keep ending their seasons. Yet Mike Tomlin shrugged on Tuesday when asked if it feels as if the Steelers are “stuck” after their fifth first-round playoff exit in eight years, all of them embarrassing in their own way.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State has slowly paced itself on offense all the way to the national championship game
item.description: Ohio State has been purposely pacing itself on offense all season, huddling more and trying to limit the number of snaps in each game of what the Buckeyes hoped and anticipated would be a long run. “I know it sounds crazy, the huddle, it’s almost like going back in time,” coach Ryan Day said.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Italian soccer club Lazio fires falconer for posting photos of his penis implant
item.description: ROME (AP) — Lazio has fired the man who handled the Italian soccer club’s eagle mascot after he posted photos and videos online of his own prosthetic penis.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daniil Medvedev smashes racket, camera during fiery outburst as he avoids Australian Open upset
item.description: Facing what could've been a massive upset, top-ranked tennis pro Daniil Medvedev destroyed a camera and his tennis racket during his first-round match at the Australian Open on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Atlanta is adjusting security plans for college football game after deadly New Orleans attack
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta leaders say the New Year's Eve vehicle attack on New Orleans’ Bourbon Street has helped guide their security plans for large upcoming events such as Monday’s national championship college football game.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: What is the NHL's 4 Nations Face-Off? Here's what you need to know
item.description: The NHL and NHLPA is hosting the 4 Nations Face-Off tournament Feb. 12-20. Here is everything you need to know to get ready for it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams' Matthew Stafford acknowledges 'playing for people back home' amid LA wildfires
item.description: Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford acknowledged the team played Monday night with a lot on their minds, including the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jemele Hill quietly deletes Caitlin Clark post following stalker arrest
item.description: Former ESPN broadcaster Jemele Hill was caught deleting a critical tweet about Caitlin Clark dealing with social media adversity after an alleged stalker was arrested.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil's João Fonseca is just 18 but he upset the No. 9 seed at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — João Fonseca definitively introduced himself to the world as the latest teen sensation in men's tennis on Tuesday night, upsetting No. 9 seed Andrey Rublev 7-6 (1), 6-3, 7-6 (5) in the first round of the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daniil Medvedev destroys a TV camera attached to the net during his 5-set Australian Open win
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Daniil Medvedev used his racket to smash a tiny camera attached to the net at the Australian Open while he was trailing someone ranked 418th before eventually avoiding a monumental upset and winning 6-2, 4-6, 3-6, 6-1, 6-2 in the first round at Rod Laver Arena on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers lose to Spurs 126-102 in their 1st game back after wildfire postponements
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Victor Wembanyama had 23 points and eight rebounds, Harrison Barnes scored 10 of his 17 points in the fourth quarter, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Lakers 126-102 on Monday night in Los Angeles' first game back from two postponements due to the wildfires devastating the area.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Verlander uses supermodel wife's name on Giants introductory Zoom call, causing awkward moment
item.description: (KRON) -- Justin Verlander uses his wife's account for Zoom calls, and a member of the San Francisco media got a kick out of it. His account name caused a funny moment during his introductory press conference on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes and his wife Brittany Mahomes have had a busy bye week
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, Fox 5

item.title: Buccaneers lose to Commanders 23-20; Commanders first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days
item.description: Jayden Daniels ran for a critical first down to set up Zane Gonzalez's 37-yard field goal that clanged off the right upright and went through as time expired, and the Commanders beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 in an NFC wild-card game Sunday night for the franchise’s first playoff win in 6,945 d
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI AP Pro Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oregon Ducks 2024 receiver arrested as fugitive
item.description: Ryan Tristan Chance Taylor -- who played under the name Ryan Pellum -- allegedly used a 9mm pistol to assault someone on December 25 in Long Beach, California.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, NewsNation

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The New England Patriots have hired Mike Vrabel as their head coach. The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach; Bears had interviewed him
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears will interview Ron Rivera for head coaching position; team says it has interviewed Lions coordinators
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears will reportedly consider a man tied to both of their Super Bowl appearances to try to lead them back there one day. The Chicago Tribune reports the Bears are expected to interview Ron Rivera on Sunday, according to NFL sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Red Rocks finish fourth in high-powered quad meet
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team got a sense of where it stacks up early in the season against some of the top teams in the country.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: LaVine scores 33 points as Bulls beat Wizards 138-105 for 5th win in 7 games
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 33 points and the Chicago Bulls beat the Washington Wizards 138-105 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vince McMahon reaches deal with SEC over hush money agreements
item.description: McMahon, according to the SEC, failed to inform WWE's board of directors and legal and financial departments of the settlement agreements.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
